method: Risk-based inspection of rendered vector previews; not full page-by-page Word certification.

samples.observations: Labels and connector lines are legible; no clipping observed.

samples.topic: UPF event exposure for UPF data collection
samples.observations: Sequence participants, arrows and service-operation labels are legible.
POST and 201 Created flow is legible and correctly oriented.
Request, success, error and redirect paths are legible.
POST data-store-records and 201 Created flow is legible.

samples.topic: T8 reference model between SCS/AS and SCEF
samples.observations: NF labels, T8 reference point and connector line are legible; no clipping observed.
Sequence participants, request URI, response paths and labels are legible.
MFAF, service name and consumer NF labels are legible.

limitations: TS 23.502 contains 280 source vector images; 153 have PNG previews and 127 remain available in original EMF/WMF form plus embedded payloads.
The conversion does not claim full page-by-page visual certification of the source Word documents.
